name: gradril
description: Security extension that validates, sanitizes, and guards prompts before they reach Copilot AI. Prevents credential leaks, PII exposure, prompt injection, and jailbreak attempts.

chatParticipants.name: gradril
chatParticipants.description: Secure AI assistant — validates prompts before sending to Copilot

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan a prompt for security risks without sending to AI

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show guard status and session statistics

disambiguation.description: The user wants to send a prompt through security validation before it reaches AI
examples: Check this code for secrets before sending to AI
Scan my prompt for sensitive data
I want to safely ask Copilot a question
Validate my prompt for PII leaks

gradril.enabled.description: Enable or disable the Gradril prompt guardrail.

gradril.backendUrl.description: URL of the Guardrails AI backend server.

gradril.backendEnabled.description: Whether to call the backend Guardrails AI server for deep ML validation.

gradril.backendTimeout.description: Backend request timeout in milliseconds. Falls back to local-only on timeout.

gradril.sanitizeThreshold.description: Risk score threshold above which prompts are sanitized (0-1).

gradril.customBlocklist.description: Additional terms or patterns to block in prompts.

gradril.auditLogEnabled.description: Enable local audit logging of prompt decisions (hashes only, never raw text).
